title: Referral Program
subtitle: Configure your tier-based referral program (reward customers for bringing new ones)

activate.description: Let your customers recommend others and earn discounts when they reach qualified-referral tiers.
activate.newCustomerDiscount: Reward for the referred customer (their first purchase)
activate.newCustomerDiscountHint: % discount the new person receives on their first purchase using the code

editor.title: Edit Level {{level}}
editor.description: Adjust this level's referral threshold and rewards. Changes only affect this level.
editor.rewardManualHint: Manually handed over by staff — not applied automatically at checkout.

errors.referralsRequired: Enter a valid number of referrals required (minimum 1)
errors.thresholdTooLow: Must be greater than {{min}} (the previous level's threshold)
errors.thresholdTooHigh: Must be less than {{max}} (the next level's threshold)
errors.atLeastOneReward: Add at least one reward for this level
errors.percentInvalid: The percentage must be between 0 and 100
errors.productRequired: Select a product for this reward

active.pauseConfirmDescription: Existing codes are preserved but new captures in TPV will be disabled until reactivated.

permissions.noConfigureAccess: You don't have permission to configure the referral program. Ask an administrator.

card.title: Referral Program
card.stateC_noCode: This person doesn't have an active code yet.
card.whatsappMessage: I recommend {{venue}}! Use my code *{{code}}* and get 10% off your first purchase.
card.fulfillConfirmDescription: Confirm you already handed this product to the customer. This action cannot be undone.
card.fulfillErrorAlreadyHandled: This courtesy was already processed. Refresh the page to see its current status.

hallOfFame.title: Hall of Fame
hallOfFame.empty: No one has referred anyone yet. When a customer uses someone's code at checkout, they'll appear here.
